name: @gmft/seccomp-shim
description: N-API binding to Linux's seccomp(2) syscall. Mirrors the @gmft/landlock-shim surface: tiny (3 functions), pure C++17, no libseccomp.so runtime dep. The BPF program is built in pure JS (see packages/tools/src/shared/bpf.ts) and passed in as a Buffer. See docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-17-gmft-v0.2-D-host-sandbox.md ADR-0011 and packages/seccomp-shim/README.md for the rationale.
